new_classes.definition_en: A process in which a fermented beverage or ethyl alcohol undergoes purification (e.g. rectification, filtration) such that the resulting product loses the organoleptic properties and characteristics of fermented beverages and acquires those of ethyl alcohol, used to discriminate CN 2208 90 91/99 from purely fermented beverages.

A quality borne by an ethyl alcohol product indicating that, as a result of a purification process, it has lost the properties and characteristics typical of fermented beverages and has acquired those of ethyl alcohol (undenatured, < 80 % vol); used to discriminate CN 2208 90 91/99.

new_classes.label_en: Undenatured Ethyl Alcohol below 80 % vol in containers > 2 L (CN 2208 90 99)
new_classes.label_de: Ethylalkohol unter 80 % vol, unvergällt, in Behältnissen mit mehr als 2 Litern (KN 2208 90 99)
new_classes.definition_en: Undenatured ethyl alcohol with an alcoholic strength by volume of less than 80 % vol, obtained not exclusively by fermentation but also through a purification process causing the loss of fermented-beverage characteristics, presented in containers of more than 2 litres; corresponds to CN code 2208 90 99.

coverage_explanation:
The axioms cover the four main distinguishing criteria for CN 2208 90 99:
1. Undenatured ethyl alcohol (complement of isDenatured; note: complement restriction on a datatype property is an approximation — a hasValue false restriction would be more precise but uses an existing TBox property).
2. Alcoholic strength below 80 % vol (decimalRange maxExclusive 80.0 on alcoholByVolumePercent).
3. Production not exclusively by fermentation but also via a purification process causing loss of fermented-beverage characteristics (PurificationProcess via producedBy; LostFermentedBeverageCharacterQuality via has quality).
4. Container volume > 2 L (someValuesFrom LargeContainer via BFO has_part), discriminating 22089099 from sibling 22089091 (≤ 2 L).

Coverage is not 1.0 because: (a) the complement restriction on the boolean isDenatured property cannot be expressed as a clean OWL DL complement restriction via the tool's available restriction types — the approximation is noted; (b) the legal text is truncated and may contain additional qualifying text not visible here. The sibling 22089091 (small container, ≤ 2 L) should use SmallContainer instead of LargeContainer.
